title: RunPod validation sweep (1.2.0 release gate): MPI-282, MPI-300, MPI-310, Head Swap
description: Umbrella: ONE RunPod session to clear every remote-deferred 1.2.0 card. Validates MPI-282 (Krea2 masked edit), MPI-300 (Qwen-Edit 2511 + 3-chip), MPI-310 (Image Describer plugin, remote fetch + GC), and Head Swap MPI-299/306 (unblocked now that node_lock is bumped to MpiNodes aaa1d2d for the box nodes, MPI-309). Runsheet + results table in validation.md; each passing sub-card moves to done. MPI-198 deferred (Linux/mac LOCAL engine, not RunPod).

events.note: Session umbrella for the 1.2.0 RunPod validation sweep, requested to clear doing-column cards before the Thursday release. Consolidates the four remote-deferred validations that MPI-282's validation.md anticipated (MPI-282, MPI-300, MPI-310, + Head Swap). MPI-309 node_lock bumped ba9e156 -> aaa1d2d (MpiNodes 1.2.6, adds MpiBox/MpiBoxCrop/MpiBoxMask/MpiFromBox, pure superset, no removed classes) so Head Swap can load on the Pod. MPI-198 explicitly deferred by the user. Detailed per-card checks live in each card's own validation.md; this card holds the session order + cross-card gotchas + the pass/fail results table.
